channel.title: About on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in About on Frank Huang

item.title: colophon
item.description: This website is a personal homepage.

How do I complete this project? Go to the Javascript Basics course and select “View Course Materials.” Go through the videos and assignments in this course to learn the JavaScript necessary to build your resume. Review your work against the Project Rubric (on the next page). When you are satisfied with your project, submit it according to the Submission Instructions on the next page. By the end: Your resume will look something like this And your repository will include the following files:
